subcodes.title: Words to May Maxwell, spoken on 1898-02-17
subcodes.first_line: You are like the rain which is poured upon the earth making it bud and blossom and become fruitful
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @symbolism, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @exhortations and counsels, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @material and spiritual existence; two books
